error: error_profile_ambiguous_credentials.hcl:28:1: Profile "ops": multiple no-constraint credentials bind endpoint "https.anthropic" — Credentials "bearer_token.anthropic-prod" and "bearer_token.anthropic-test" both bind endpoint "https.anthropic" in profile "ops" with no dispatch discriminator set on either the credential block or the profile entry. At most one fallback (catchall) credential per (profile, endpoint).
